title: Gritt exits stealth with $34 million for robots to build solar plants—then, everything else | TechCrunch
summary: Puri says that a typical eight-person crew workers can install 800 panels a day, but the same crew working with Gritt’s systems can install 3,000 to 4,000 panels each day.
